name: Italian Hamburger Deep Dish
recipeIngredient: Instant mashed potato buds, enough for 6 or 7 servings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a rectangular baking dish, 11" x 7" x 1 1/2".
3. Cook beef, salt, pepper, and garlic in a 12-inch skillet over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until beef is brown; drain.
4. Prepare potatoes as directed on the package for 6 or 7 servings—except stir in onion and oregano.
5. Spread half of the potato mixture on bottom of baking dish.
6. Layer with beef and half of the tomatoes.
7. Top with remaining potatoes, tomatoes, and cheese.
8. Bake uncovered for about 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
